cards.prompt: Base b = new Derived(); b.V() (override) и b.N() (new) — что печатают?
cards.code: using System; class Base { public virtual string V()=>"Base.V"; public string N()=>"Base.N"; } class Derived: Base { public override string V()=>"Derived.V"; public new string N()=>"Derived.N"; } Base b = new Derived(); Console.WriteLine(b.V()); Console.WriteLine(b.N());

cards.prompt: Shape.Describe() зовёт virtual Area(); Shape s=new Circle(2); s.Describe()?
cards.code: using System; class Shape { public virtual double Area()=>0; public virtual string Describe()=>$"Area={Area()}"; } class Circle: Shape { double r; public Circle(double r){this.r=r;} public override double Area()=>Math.Round(3.14159*r*r,2); } Shape s = new Circle(2); Console.WriteLine(s.Describe());
